# HotPaper

> HotPaper (https://hotpaper.ai) is a daily AI/ML research paper discovery service. It collects trending arXiv papers every day, ranks them by community signals, and publishes structured Korean-language summaries (7 sections: problem, method, results, limitations, etc.), topic tags, and trend analytics. Built and operated by the Hyperautonomy AI Lab at Seoul National University.

All API endpoints below are public, return JSON unless noted, and require no authentication.

## Agent-readable API endpoints

- https://hotpaper.ai/api/feed/daily : Today's featured papers with one-line summaries, tags, and the list of available dates. Optional query param `date=YYYY-MM-DD`.
- https://hotpaper.ai/api/feed/today.json : Machine-readable JSON feed of today's featured papers.
- https://hotpaper.ai/api/tags/popular : Most popular topic tags with paper counts.
- https://hotpaper.ai/api/search?q={query} : Full-text search over collected papers and summaries.
- https://hotpaper.ai/api/seo/paper/{arxiv_id} : Server-rendered HTML page for a single paper (title, abstract, Korean summary) — readable without JavaScript.

## Feeds

- https://hotpaper.ai/rss.xml : RSS feed of daily featured papers with Korean summaries.
- https://hotpaper.ai/sitemap.xml : Sitemap of all paper pages.

## MCP server

An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server is available for AI agents to query HotPaper directly:
https://github.com/juhyun-hai/Paper-Agents/tree/master/mcp_server

## Notes

- Paper pages live at https://hotpaper.ai/paper/{arxiv_id} (e.g. https://hotpaper.ai/paper/2501.12345). Crawlers and AI agents receive a server-rendered HTML version automatically.
- Source data: arXiv (cs.AI, cs.LG, cs.CL and related categories), updated daily around 04:00 KST.
